steps.title: Find the date requirement
steps.content: The student's goal is to specify when Kenorland formed. The relevant note gives the exact timing: Kenorland formed about 2.6 billion years ago.

steps.title: Use the specific date
steps.content: A says only long ago, C describes the supercontinent cycle in general, and D defines Kenorland as a supercontinent without giving its formation time. The effective choice states the exact date from the notes. The answer is B.
